allow: PowerShell($content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\('C:\\Users\\Gabriel-Dalton\\Documents\\GitHub\\claude-statusline-tokens\\statusline-tokens.ps1', [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); $lineNum=0; foreach \($line in \($content -split "`n"\)\) { $lineNum++; for \($i=0; $i -lt $line.Length; $i++\) { $c=[int][char]$line[$i]; if \($c -gt 127\) { "Line ${lineNum} col ${i}: U+{0:X4} '{1}'" -f $c, $line[$i]; break } } })

PowerShell($hash1 = \(Get-FileHash "C:\\Users\\Gabriel-Dalton\\.claude\\statusline-tokens.ps1"\).Hash; $hash2 = \(Get-FileHash "C:\\Users\\Gabriel-Dalton\\Documents\\GitHub\\claude-statusline-tokens\\statusline-tokens.ps1"\).Hash; if \($hash1 -eq $hash2\) { Write-Host "IDENTICAL" } else { Write-Host "DIFFERENT" }; Write-Host "personal: $hash1"; Write-Host "repo:     $hash2")

PowerShell($now = [DateTime]::UtcNow; $r5 = $now.AddHours\(2\).AddMinutes\(15\).ToString\('o'\); $r7 = $now.AddDays\(3\).AddHours\(12\).ToString\('o'\); $payload = @{ cwd = \(Get-Location\).Path; session_id = 'test'; transcript_path = ''; model = @{ id = 'claude-opus-4-7'; display_name = 'Opus 4.7' }; workspace = @{ current_dir = \(Get-Location\).Path }; rate_limits = @{ five_hour = @{ used_percentage = 23; resets_at = $r5 }; seven_day = @{ used_percentage = 45; resets_at = $r7 } } } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 -Compress; Write-Host "INPUT: $payload"; Write-Host "---"; $out = $payload | powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "C:\\Users\\Gabriel-Dalton\\.claude\\statusline-tokens.ps1"; Write-Host "OUTPUT:"; Write-Host $out)
